# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    headers: { "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" },
    ...init,
  });
}

function parseValue(value: string): string | number | boolean {
  if (value === "true") return true;
  if (value === "false") return false;
  if (value === "null") return null as unknown as string;
  if (value !== "" && !Number.isNaN(Number(value)) && /^\s*-?\d+(\.\d+)?\s*$/.test(value)) {
    return Number(value);
  }
  return value;
}

function normalizeKeyPart(part: unknown): string | number | boolean {
  if (typeof part === "string" || typeof part === "number" || typeof part === "boolean") return part;
  return String(part);
}

function buildUserKey(userId: string, filterParam?: string, filterValue?: unknown) {
  const parts: Deno.KvKey = ["users", normalizeKeyPart(userId)];
  if (filterParam !== undefined) parts.push(normalizeKeyPart(filterParam));
  if (filterValue !== undefined) parts.push(normalizeKeyPart(filterValue));
  return parts;
}

function buildPrefixFromFilters(filters: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const parts: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
  if (filters.userId !== undefined) parts.push(normalizeKeyPart(filters.userId));
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(filters)) {
    if (k === "userId") continue;
    parts.push(normalizeKeyPart(k));
    parts.push(normalizeKeyPart(v));
  }
  return parts;
}

async function handleSearch(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = url.searchParams;

  const filters: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
    if (key === "limit" || key === "cursor" || key === "exact") continue;
    filters[key] = parseValue(value);
  }

  const limit = Math.min(Math.max(Number(params.get("limit") ?? "50"), 1), 100);
  const cursor = params.get("cursor") ?? undefined;
  const exact = params.get("exact") === "true";

  let entries: Deno.KvEntryMaybe<unknown>[] = [];

  if (filters.userId !== undefined && Object.keys(filters).length >= 1) {
    if (exact && filters.filterParam !== undefined && filters.filterValue !== undefined) {
      const key = buildUserKey(String(filters.userId), String(filters.filterParam), filters.filterValue);
      const res = await kv.get(key);
      entries = res.versionstamp ? [res] : [];
    } else if (filters.filterParam !== undefined && filters.filterValue !== undefined) {
      const key = buildUserKey(String(filters.userId), String(filters.filterParam), filters.filterValue);
      const res = await kv.get(key);
      entries = res.versionstamp ? [res] : [];
    } else {
      const prefix = buildPrefixFromFilters(filters);
      for await (const entry of kv.list({ prefix, cursor, limit })) {
        entries.push(entry);
      }
    }
  } else {
    const prefix = buildPrefixFromFilters(filters);
    for await (const entry of kv.list({ prefix, cursor, limit })) {
      entries.push(entry);
    }
  }

  return jsonResponse({
    ok: true,
    count: entries.length,
    entries: entries.map((entry) => ({
      key: entry.key,
      value: entry.value,
      versionstamp: entry.versionstamp,
    })),
  });
}

async function handleGetUser(req: Request, userId: string) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const filterParam = url.searchParams.get("filterParam") ?? undefined;
  const filterValue = url.searchParams.get("filterValue");
  const key = buildUserKey(userId, filterParam, filterValue !== null ? parseValue(filterValue) : undefined);
  const result = await kv.get(key);
  if (!result.versionstamp) return jsonResponse({ ok: false, error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
  return jsonResponse({ ok: true, key: result.key, value: result.value, versionstamp: result.versionstamp });
}

async function handlePutUser(req: Request, userId: string) {
  const body = await req.json().catch(() => null);
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object") return jsonResponse({ ok: false, error: "Invalid JSON" }, { status: 400 });

  const record = body as Record<string, unknown>;
  const filterParam = typeof record.filterParam === "string" ? record.filterParam : undefined;
  const filterValue = record.filterValue;
  const value = record.value ?? record;

  const key = buildUserKey(userId, filterParam, filterValue);
  await kv.set(key, value);

  return jsonResponse({ ok: true, key, value }, { status: 201 });
}

async function handleDeleteUser(req: Request, userId: string) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const filterParam = url.searchParams.get("filterParam") ?? undefined;
  const filterValue = url.searchParams.get("filterValue");
  const key = buildUserKey(userId, filterParam, filterValue !== null ? parseValue(filterValue) : undefined);
  const res = await kv.delete(key);
  return jsonResponse({ ok: true, key });
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const pathname = url.pathname;
    const method = req.method.toUpperCase();

    if (pathname === "/search" && method === "GET") {
      return await handleSearch(req);
    }

    const userMatch = pathname.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
    if (userMatch) {
      const userId = decodeURIComponent(userMatch[1]);
      if (method === "GET") return await handleGetUser(req, userId);
      if (method === "PUT" || method === "POST") return await handlePutUser(req, userId);
      if (method === "DELETE") return await handleDeleteUser(req, userId);
      return jsonResponse({ ok: false, error: "Method not allowed" }, { status: 405 });
    }

    if (pathname === "/health" && method === "GET") {
      return jsonResponse({ ok: true });
    }

    return jsonResponse({ ok: false, error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
  } catch (error) {
    return jsonResponse(
      {
        ok: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
});
